Knot Types

Common Chinese knots to learn first

GBeginnerGood Luck KnotLucky decor, small hanging ornaments, beginner practice

Often used as a visual symbol of blessing, good wishes, and festive decoration.

CMediumChinese Button KnotClosures, bracelets, keychains, decorative ends

A compact knot used for structure as well as decoration.

PMediumPan Chang KnotSymbolic decor, pendants, larger knotwork

Often linked with the endless knot idea and continuous connection.

DBeginnerDouble Coin KnotBracelets, charms, decorative cords

Commonly associated with wealth symbolism because of the coin-like shape.

EMediumEndless KnotSymbolic gifts, wall decor, jewelry motifs

Represents continuity, connection, and an unbroken pattern.

CBeginnerChinese Knot BraceletDIY bracelets, gifts, small craft products

Usually combines decorative knotwork with color and gift symbolism.
